property_value: this is the semantic view for our movies lens

This table stores information about movies, user ratings, and user interactions with the movies. It captures movie details such as title, release year, and genre, as well as user information including name, location, and contact details. The table also tracks user ratings and interactions with the movies, including the timestamp of the interaction and the type of interaction.
The type of movie genre, such as action, comedy, drama, etc., that categorizes the movie's style, tone, and content.
The timestamp when a user interacted with the movie, representing the number of seconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, at 00:00:00 UTC.
The type of interaction a user had with a movie, either clicking on it or watching it.
Unique identifier for each movie in the database.
The year in which the movie was released.
The date and time when a movie rating was recorded.
The city where the user is located.
The country where the user is located.
The email address of the user who interacted with the movie content.
The first name of the user who interacted with the movie.
Unique identifier for the user who interacted with the movie.
The last name of the user who interacted with the movie.
The phone number of the user who interacted with the movie content.
Average rating given by users to a movie, on a scale of 1 to 5.
The state in which the user is located.
